content: We can reframe cutting-edge 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems as being anchored by a persistent 'internal curiosity agent' that autonomously prioritizes which new unlabeled data to encode into long-term memory, rather than relying on external human or task-specific selection signals. This small specialized curiosity agent within a larger agent architecture uses ICM/RND mechanisms to tag high-uncertainty, high-surprise new experiences for long-term retention, pruning low-novelty redundant data on its own.
